query_result.reasoning: Now I have a pretty complete picture. Let me also look at the purchase obligations more carefully to see if there's a GPU-specific breakdown.

tool_calls.name: retrieve_information
tool_calls.args: {"prompt": "Find the complete purchase obligations maturity schedule from {{spacex_s1}}. Show the breakdown by period (less than 1 year, 1-3 years, 3-5 years, more than 5 years). Also describe what these purchase obligations primarily consist of."}

tool_call.name: retrieve_information

parsed_args.prompt: Find the complete purchase obligations maturity schedule from {{spacex_s1}}. Show the breakdown by period (less than 1 year, 1-3 years, 3-5 years, more than 5 years). Also describe what these purchase obligations primarily consist of.

tool_output.output:
The purchase obligations maturity schedule, showing the breakdown by period, is as follows:

| Period | Amount (in millions) |
| :--- | :--- |
| Less than 1 year (2026) | $2,720 |
| 1–3 years (2027–2028) | $22,726 |
| 3–5 years (2029–2030) | $5 |
| More than 5 years (Thereafter) | $— |
| **Total** | **$25,451** |

**What these purchase obligations primarily consist of:**  
These non-cancelable contractual commitments are primarily for the company’s investments in **AI infrastructure and third-party cloud capacity arrangements**, as well as other service arrangements. They also include commitments under the Spectrum Transaction, which are payable in a combination of cash and the company’s Class A Common Stock.
